mapper.select: SELECT chatroom_idx, auction_idx, buyer_idx, bidder_idx, created_at FROM chatroom WHERE chatroom_idx = #{chatroomIdx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chatroom ( auction_idx, buyer_idx, bidder_idx, created_at ) VALUES ( #{auctionIdx}, #{buyerIdx}, #{bidderIdx}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT chatroom_idx, auction_idx, buyer_idx, bidder_idx, created_at FROM chatroom WHERE buyer_idx = #{memIdx} OR bidder_idx = #{memIdx} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT cr.chatroom_idx AS chatroomIdx, cr.auction_idx AS auctionIdx, CASE WHEN cr.buyer_idx = #{memIdx} THEN cr.bidder_idx ELSE cr.buyer_idx END AS opponentIdx, COALESCE(mp.mem_nickname, m.mem_name, m.mem_id) AS opponentName, lm.message_content AS lastMessage, lm.sent_at AS lastMessageAt, COALESCE(uc.unread_count, 0) AS unreadCount FROM chatroom cr INNER JOIN member m ON m.mem_idx = CASE WHEN cr.buyer_idx = #{memIdx} THEN cr.bidder_idx ELSE cr.buyer_idx END LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON mp.mem_idx = m.mem_idx LEFT JOIN chatmessage lm ON lm.message_idx = ( SELECT cm2.message_idx FROM chatmessage cm2 WHERE cm2.chatroom_idx = cr.chatroom_idx ORDER BY cm2.sent_at DESC, cm2.message_idx DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cm.chatroom_idx, COUNT(*) AS unread_count FROM chatmessage cm INNER JOIN chatroom c ON c.chatroom_idx = cm.chatroom_idx WHERE cm.is_read = 'N' AND cm.sender_idx != #{memIdx} AND (c.buyer_idx = #{memIdx} OR c.bidder_idx = #{memIdx}) GROUP BY cm.chatroom_idx ) uc ON uc.chatroom_idx = cr.chatroom_idx WHERE cr.buyer_idx = #{memIdx} OR cr.bidder_idx = #{memIdx} ORDER BY COALESCE(lm.sent_at, cr.created_at) DESC
